content.en:
The group flew towards the mysterious valley.

Along the way, the mist beasts encountered were all powerful, and they even encountered a misty beast comparable to Tianzun, but they were all killed by Ye Tian.

The crowd was safely out of the valley.

"Fa Tian Juggernaut, this is it!"

Lord Yunlan pointed to the valley in front of him.

It's a pity that the fog here is also extremely thick, and it is impossible to explore the depths of the valley with the master's divine sense, and from the depths of the valley there are faint wisps of terrifying aura, and the rest of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group even tremble, as if there is something terrifying inside the valley.

"Life Heavenly Pupil!"

Ye Tian opened this ability, and suddenly the life breath of the entire valley was seen by him.

Although the Life Heavenly Pupil can only see the life level of a creature, it can also roughly judge the strength of a life.

"Thirteen Heavenly Venerable-level mist beasts, one supreme-level misty beast, this is equivalent to a small territory of a supreme-level misty beast!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He now felt that the father who was the master of Yunlan was lucky, and he didn't cause the attack of that supreme-level misty beast, otherwise a mere Tianzun-level powerhouse would not be able to escape at all.

"Don't go in, just stay outside, as for the Yunlan Juggernaut, you can choose to go in with me or stay outside. Ye Tian said.

"I'll go in with you!"

Lord Yunlan was also very curious about the situation in this valley, so he said so.

"Yes, but you can't make a move, just stand beside me and watch, the misty beast inside is very strong!"

Ye Tian said.

"Understood!"

Yunlan Juggernaut nodded.

She knew the situation in this valley, and her father in the Tianzun realm was only driven out when he first entered the valley, and if he hadn't escaped quickly, he would have even fallen inside the valley.

Therefore, she is very self-aware and will not mess around.

As for the rest of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group staying outside and opening the defensive formation, as long as they are not very unlucky, nothing will happen in a short time.

If something really happened, Ye Tian would be able to come out in time to rescue them.

Valley.

Ye Tian and Yun Lan Juggernaut walked in, and they were soon attacked by a group of mist beasts, these mist beasts were all misty beasts that dominated the realm, but each of them was very powerful.

Yun Lan's master can deal with one or two such mist beasts alone, but now there are not just one or two, but hundreds, and in the outside world, there are hundreds of masters!

Many cosmic clans don't have so many masters, but now there are so many master-level misty beasts in this misty region, and this is just a valley!

"There's a big secret in the Misty Zone!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

Everyone knows the big secrets, but no one has the full knowledge of them.

It's like everyone knows that there are secrets in the depths of the Abyss of Destruction, but who can go down? Even the Lord of the Yuan Gu does not dare to go down, otherwise if he is surrounded by multiple Destruction Kings, and the rules are not obvious there, the Lord of the Yuan Gu will fall.

Rumble!!!!!

A huge black shadow attacked, and its terrifying aura and speed against the sky made the Yunlan Juggernaut feel cold, as if he had witnessed death.

"Heavenly Venerable-level Mist Beast!"

Yun Lan Juggernaut swallowed his saliva, and his body couldn't help but tremble with fear.

In the misty area, no matter how weak the Tianzun-level mist beast is, it is very terrifying, more terrifying than a blood wolf, and now facing a Tianzun-level misty beast at close range, how can she not be afraid.

"Die!"

Ye Tian made a move, replaced the knife with his hand, and killed the Tianzun-level misty beast with one sword.

I saw that the corpse of the Heavenly Venerable-level Mist Beast fell to the ground, but the aura on its body was not annihilated.

Before, the Tianzun-level misty beast that died on the misty river, Yunlan Juggernaut didn't have time to collect it, but now the corpse of this Tianzun-level misty beast is right in front of him!

"Lord Fatian, do you still want this misty beast corpse?"

Lord Yunlan asked.

"Don't!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The corpse of this Heavenly Venerable-level Mist Beast may be worth a lot of Divine Crystals, but he doesn't lack those resources at all, so he doesn't care at all.

"Then I'll take it!"

Lord Yunlan hurriedly collected this Tianzun-level mist beast corpse, just the Tianzun-level misty beast crystal, its value is very large, and it can even be used as a trading currency in the Chaos Sea, which is enough to exchange for many cultivation resources.

"A little trouble is coming!"

Ye Tian suddenly looked at the depths of the valley and said.

"What's the little trouble?"

Lord Yunlan asked.

"Twelve Heavenly Venerable-level mist beasts, plus one supreme-level misty beast!"

Ye Tian said very blandly.

"What, Fa Heavenly Master, let's run away!"

Yunlan was shocked.

Even if she could go to the front to pick the Nine Colored Sky Crystal Grass, she didn't have that mind at the moment.

Supreme-level misty beast, how powerful is that?

In her opinion, no matter how powerful Ye Tian is, he can only have Tianzun-level combat power at best, and it is impossible to have supreme-level combat power.

"Don't worry, it's just a weaker supreme-level misty beast, which is probably equivalent to a fifth-rank supreme!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Even if it's a fifth-rank supreme, it's not something we can compete with!" Lord Yunlan was very anxious and persuaded Ye Tian again and again.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The breath of the twelve Heavenly Venerable-level mist beasts and the breath of the supreme-level mist beast crushed and suppressed this void, as if it had frozen time and space.

At this moment, Yunlan Juggernaut found that he couldn't even move.

Terror!

A real horror!

At this moment, she regretted it very much, she had known that this valley had a supreme-level misty beast, how could she come here!

Suddenly.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's momentum erupted, allowing the Yunlan Juggernaut to break away from the aura suppression.

"Twelve Heavenly Venerable-level misty beasts, and one fifth-rank supreme misty beast, also want to kill me?

Ye Tian took out his Supreme Treasure Long Knife and performed the third form of the Heavenly Sword Series - the Heavenly Killing Knife!

"Heaven Killing Knife, Slash!"

Boom !!

Heaven and earth were filled with countless sword lights, and each light contained a supreme sword aura, as if it could kill all enemies.

Tear !!

One by one, the Heavenly Venerable-level mist beasts were shattered by the sword qi, and even the fifth-rank supreme-level mist beast didn't have time to escape, it was cut into countless pieces and fell on the spot.

"It's too weak! I don't have any life-saving ability, and there is still a big gap between me and the real Supreme!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Side.

Yunlan Juggernaut was stunned.

Twelve Heavenly Venerable-level mist beasts, one supreme-level misty beast, just died?

"It turns out that it's really a small trouble, no, it's not even a trouble, the Fa Heavenly Lord is so strong!"

Yunlan Juggernaut was shocked.

She even wondered if Ye Tian was the master after all, the master could kill the Supreme, just kidding!

"Let's go, there are no more powerful misty beasts in this valley, let's go pick the elixir!"

Ye Tian smiled.
